question_ne: Asset ra Liability ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: asset ra liability ma k farak cha
explanation_ne: Asset bhaneko company ko swami ma aune saman, liability bhaneko tirnu parne rin. Asset le net worth badhaucha, liability le ghataycha.

question_ne: Asset ra Liability ko tax treatment kasto cha?
question_normalized: asset ra liability ko tax treatment kasto cha
explanation_ne: Asset ko depreciation le karcha ghatcha, liability ko interest le pani karcha ghatcha. Tara asset bechda capital gains tax lagncha.

question_ne: Asset ra Liability ko liquidity ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: asset ra liability ko liquidity ma k farak cha
explanation_ne: Asset liquid huncha, liability liquid huna parcha (tirnu parcha). Current ratio ma asset mathi, liability tala.

question_ne: Asset ra Liability ko valuation method ma k farak?
question_normalized: asset ra liability ko valuation method ma k farak
explanation_ne: Asset ko value ghatcha depreciation le, liability ko value generally badhdaina except interest.

question_ne: Asset ra Liability le company ko financial position lai kasari asar garcha?
question_normalized: asset ra liability le company ko financial position lai kasari asar garcha
explanation_ne: Asset dherai huda company baliyo, liability dherai huda risky. Debt-to-equity ratio herincha.

question_ne: Asset ra Liability ko accounting entries ma k farak?
question_normalized: asset ra liability ko accounting entries ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Debit to increase, Credit to decrease
comparison_table.option_b: Credit to increase, Debit to decrease

explanation_ne: Asset ko debit balance huncha, liability ko credit balance. Accounting equation: Assets = Liabilities + Equity.

question_ne: Debit ra Credit ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: debit ra credit ma k farak cha

comparison_table.option_a: Assets and expenses have debit balance
comparison_table.option_b: Liabilities, equity, income have credit balance

explanation_ne: Debit le asset ra expense badhaucha, credit le liability, equity ra income badhaucha. Double entry ma debit = credit.

question_ne: Debit ra Credit ko journal entry ma k role cha?
question_normalized: debit ra credit ko journal entry ma k role cha

comparison_table.option_a: Sum of debits equals sum of credits
comparison_table.option_b: Sum of credits equals sum of debits

explanation_ne: Journal ma debit paila auncha, credit pachhi. Duitai ko total equal huna parcha.

question_ne: Debit ra Credit ko effect on profit ra loss ma k farak?
question_normalized: debit ra credit ko effect on profit ra loss ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Net profit = Credit balances - Debit balances (income - expenses)
comparison_table.option_b: Same formula, but debits represent expenses

explanation_ne: Income credit ma, expense debit ma. Profit = total credit - total debit.

question_ne: Debit ra Credit ko balance sheet ma k significance?
question_normalized: debit ra credit ko balance sheet ma k significance

comparison_table.option_a: Assets and contra-liabilities are debit balances
comparison_table.option_b: Liabilities and equity are credit balances

explanation_ne: Balance sheet ma debit side assets, credit side liabilities+equity. Duitai equal huna parcha.

question_ne: Debit ra Credit ko car driver example ma k farak?
question_normalized: debit ra credit ko car driver example ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Students learn DEAD (Debit Expenses, Assets, Drawings)
comparison_table.option_b: Students learn CLIC (Credit Liabilities, Income, Capital)

explanation_ne: Debit ra credit duitai account ko doobhai side hun. DEAD ra CLIC rule yaad rakhnu.

question_ne: Debit ra Credit ko computerized accounting ma k farak?
question_normalized: debit ra credit ko computerized accounting ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Entered as positive in asset/expense accounts
comparison_table.option_b: Entered as positive in liability/equity/income accounts

comparison_table.option_a: Debit balances show in trial balance debit column
comparison_table.option_b: Credit balances show in credit column

comparison_table.option_a: If total debit != total credit, error
Tally, Busy, etc. follow same rule

explanation_ne: Computerized ma pani debit/credit rule same cha. Trial balance ma debit ra credit total equal huna parcha.

question_ne: Cash accounting ra accrual accounting ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: cash accounting ra accrual accounting ma k farak cha
explanation_ne: Cash accounting ma paisa aaye/gaye matra record garnu parcha. Accrual ma transaction huda record garnu parcha - paisa aayena bhane pani. VAT registered businesses lai accrual compulsory cha.
when_to_use_a: Small kirana, personal, not VAT registered

question_ne: Cash ra Accrual accounting ko timing ma k farak?
question_normalized: cash ra accrual accounting ko timing ma k farak
explanation_ne: Cash ma jaba paisa aucha taba income, jaba jancha taba expense. Accrual ma income earn bhako bela ra expense incur bhako bela record.

question_ne: Cash ra Accrual accounting ko financial statement ma k asar?
question_normalized: cash ra accrual accounting ko financial statement ma k asar

comparison_table.option_b: Shows revenues and expenses regardless of cash

comparison_table.option_a: May not accept for large loans

explanation_ne: Cash accounting le profit nai cash flow jasto dekhincha, tara actual performance accurate hudaina. Accrual le true profit dekhaucha.

question_ne: Cash ra Accrual accounting ko Nepal ma legal requirement k cha?
question_normalized: cash ra accrual accounting ko nepal ma legal requirement k cha

comparison_table.option_a: Allowed for individuals and small businesses with turnover < Rs. 2 crore
comparison_table.option_b: Mandatory for companies and VAT registered entities

comparison_table.option_a: Can use cash basis for income tax
Not applicable for VAT (cash basis not allowed)
No audit required for cash basis
comparison_table.option_b: Audit required for accrual (if threshold crossed)
Required for banks and financial institutions

explanation_ne: Nepal ma sano business lai cash basis allow cha, tara VAT tirako company lai accrual compulsory.

question_ne: Cash ra Accrual accounting ko example diu?
question_normalized: cash ra accrual accounting ko example diu

comparison_table.option_b: Record sale and receivable on invoice date
Record purchase and payable on bill date
Record asset (prepaid) and expense over period

explanation_ne: Cash ma jaba paisa linchau taba income, jaba tirchau taba expense. Accrual ma transaction ko time mai entry.

question_ne: Cash ra Accrual accounting ko advantage disadvantage?
question_normalized: cash ra accrual accounting ko advantage disadvantage

comparison_table.option_b: May show profit but no cash

comparison_table.option_a: For service providers with cash sales

explanation_ne: Cash accounting simple tara timing mislead garcha. Accrual complex tara true financial position dekhaucha.
when_to_use_a: When simplicity and cash control are key
when_to_use_b: When accuracy and compliance are needed

question_ne: VAT ra Income Tax ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: vat ra income tax ma k farak cha

comparison_table.option_b: Progressive rates (1% to 36% for individuals, 25% for companies)

explanation_ne: VAT bhaneko bechda lagne tax, consumer le tiracha tara business le collect garera government lai bujhcha. Income tax profit ma lagcha.
when_to_use_b: When calculating annual tax liability (income tax)

question_ne: VAT ra Income Tax ko calculation method ma k farak?
question_normalized: vat ra income tax ko calculation method ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Allowed for VAT paid on purchases

explanation_ne: VAT ma input VAT minus output VAT garne. Income tax ma profit ma rate apply.

question_ne: VAT ra Income Tax ko compliance burden kasto?
question_normalized: vat ra income tax ko compliance burden kasto

comparison_table.option_a: Need to maintain invoices, VAT bills
comparison_table.option_b: Need to maintain all income/expense records
High audit scrutiny for income tax

explanation_ne: Duitai ko record rakhnu parcha. VAT monthly, income tax yearly. Duitai ko penalty cha.

question_ne: VAT ra Income Tax ko impact on pricing ma k farak?
question_normalized: vat ra income tax ko impact on pricing ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: VAT added to selling price (customer pays)
comparison_table.option_b: Income tax reduces net profit, not directly on price

comparison_table.option_a: VAT does not affect profit margin (collect and remit)
VAT collected must be paid to govt, affects cash flow
comparison_table.option_b: Income tax paid after year end, affects cash flow

comparison_table.option_a: VAT registered must show VAT in invoice

explanation_ne: VAT pasal le collect garera bujhcha, profit ma asar gardaina. Income tax profit bata tirnu parcha.

question_ne: VAT ra Income Tax ko Nepal ma kasko limit k cha?
question_normalized: vat ra income tax ko nepal ma kasko limit k cha

comparison_table.option_a: Annual turnover > Rs. 5 million (or 2 million for some)

explanation_ne: VAT registration compulsory if turnover crosses limit. Income tax PAN required for all businesses.
when_to_use_b: When obtaining PAN for income tax

question_ne: VAT ra Income Tax ko Nepal ma common mistakes?
question_normalized: vat ra income tax ko nepal ma common mistakes

comparison_table.option_a: Not issuing VAT invoice or claiming false input
comparison_table.option_b: Not declaring all income or claiming false expenses

comparison_table.option_a: Penalty up to 100% of VAT evaded
comparison_table.option_b: Penalty up to 100% of tax evaded

comparison_table.option_a: Keep all purchase invoices for input credit
comparison_table.option_b: Keep all expense bills for deduction

explanation_ne: VAT ma invoice chaincha, income tax ma bill chaincha. Duitai ma fake claim garda jhyau.

question_ne: Private company ra Public company ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: private company ra public company ma k farak cha

comparison_table.option_b: Can raise from public through IPO

explanation_ne: Private company ko shares public ma bechdaina, public company le IPO garera public bata paisa uthauchha. Public company lai dherai disclosure garnu parcha.

question_ne: Private ra Public company ko governance ma k farak?
question_normalized: private ra public company ko governance ma k farak

comparison_table.option_b: Annual general meeting with all shareholders

explanation_ne: Public company ma independent director ra AGM compulsory. Private company ma flexible.
when_to_use_b: When transparency and governance are needed for investors

question_ne: Private ra Public company ko financial reporting ma k farak?
question_normalized: private ra public company ko financial reporting ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Need to file with ROC, not public
comparison_table.option_b: Publicly available on company website and stock exchange

comparison_table.option_a: Audit required but not mandatory for small
Private company can avoid some disclosures
comparison_table.option_b: Public company must disclose segment, related party

explanation_ne: Public company ko financial statement public ma huncha, private ko limited. Duitai audit garnu parcha.

question_ne: Private ra Public company ko tax treatment ma k farak?
question_normalized: private ra public company ko tax treatment ma k farak

comparison_table.option_b: May get tax exemptions if listed (if any)

explanation_ne: Tax rate same, tara public company lai kehi incentives huna sakcha (e.g., if listed).

question_ne: Private ra Public company ko share transfer ma k farak?
question_normalized: private ra public company ko share transfer ma k farak
explanation_ne: Private ma share bechna paudaina public ma, public ma stock exchange ma bechne.

question_ne: Private ra Public company ko cost of compliance ma k farak?
question_normalized: private ra public company ko cost of compliance ma k farak

comparison_table.option_b: Annual returns, audit, SEBON fees, stock exchange fees

explanation_ne: Public company ko compliance cost dherai, tara capital access ramro.
when_to_use_b: When access to public capital is needed

question_ne: Sole proprietorship ra Partnership ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: sole proprietorship ra partnership ma k farak cha

comparison_table.option_b: Joint decision (or as per partnership deed)

explanation_ne: Sole ma eklai, partnership ma sajhedari. Duitai ma unlimited liability huncha (general partnership ma).

question_ne: Sole ra Partnership ko tax treatment ma k farak?
question_normalized: sole ra partnership ko tax treatment ma k farak

comparison_table.option_b: Partnership files return, partners also taxed on share
Partnership pays tax at corporate rate? (In Nepal, partnership taxed as separate entity?)

comparison_table.option_a: Income Tax Act treats as individual

explanation_ne: Sole ma personal tax, partnership ma partnership tax (or partners' share). Nepal ma partnership separate entity.

question_ne: Sole ra Partnership ko liability ma k farak?
question_normalized: sole ra partnership ko liability ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Owner personally liable for all debts

comparison_table.option_b: Partnership can be sued, partners also

explanation_ne: Duitai ma unlimited liability, tara partnership ma sajhedari sabai ko liability.

question_ne: Sole ra Partnership ko capital requirement ma k farak?
question_normalized: sole ra partnership ko capital requirement ma k farak
explanation_ne: Partnership ma capital jamma garnu sajilo, sole ma eklai jamma garnu.
when_to_use_a: When you have sufficient own funds
when_to_use_b: When you need more capital from partners

question_ne: Partnership ra Company ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: partnership ra company ma k farak cha
explanation_ne: Partnership ma separate legal entity chaincha, company ma chha. Company ma limited liability ra perpetual succession.
when_to_use_b: For larger businesses with growth plans

question_ne: Partnership ra Company ko tax treatment ma k farak?
question_normalized: partnership ra company ko tax treatment ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Partnership taxed at corporate rate (25%)? (or individual?)
No dividend tax (profit distributed as partner share)
Partners taxed on share of profit
comparison_table.option_b: Company pays tax, shareholders pay dividend tax

comparison_table.option_a: TDS on interest, salary to partners
Partnership taxed as separate entity (Income Tax Act)

explanation_ne: Duitai ko tax rate same, but distribution ma farak. Company ma dividend tax, partnership ma share taxed at partner level.
when_to_use_a: If you want to avoid dividend tax

question_ne: Partnership ra Company ko governance ma k farak?
question_normalized: partnership ra company ko governance ma k farak
explanation_ne: Partnership ma partners nai manager, company ma board. Company ko compliance dherai.

question_ne: Partnership ra Company ko liability limit ma k farak?
question_normalized: partnership ra company ko liability limit ma k farak

comparison_table.option_b: Can sue company only (except in fraud)

explanation_ne: Company le limited liability diyo, partnership ma personal liability.
when_to_use_a: When risk is low or you accept liability
when_to_use_b: When you want to protect personal assets

question_ne: Sole proprietorship ra Company ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: sole proprietorship ra company ma k farak cha
explanation_ne: Sole ma unlimited liability, company ma limited. Company perpetual, sole ma owner sanga sakkincha.
when_to_use_a: Very small business with no external investors

question_ne: Sole ra Company ko tax ma k farak?
question_normalized: sole ra company ko tax ma k farak
explanation_ne: Sole ma personal tax, company ma corporate tax. Company ko rate flat 25%, individual progressive.
when_to_use_a: If you have lower personal income
when_to_use_b: If you want to retain profits in business

question_ne: Sole ra Company ko compliance burden?
question_normalized: sole ra company ko compliance burden
explanation_ne: Company compliance dherai, sole ma simple.
when_to_use_a: If you want to avoid paperwork

question_ne: Sole ra Company ko liability protection ma k farak?
question_normalized: sole ra company ko liability protection ma k farak
explanation_ne: Company ma personal assets safe, sole ma not.
when_to_use_a: If you have few personal assets to protect
when_to_use_b: If you have significant personal assets

question_ne: TDS ra Advance Tax ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: tds ra advance tax ma k farak cha

comparison_table.option_a: Tax deducted at source by payer
comparison_table.option_b: Tax paid in advance by taxpayer
Advance tax credit available when filing

explanation_ne: TDS bhaneko aru le katcha, advance tax bhaneko afai tirne. Duitai credit paucha.
when_to_use_a: When making payments subject to TDS

question_ne: TDS ra Advance Tax ko calculation method ma k farak?
question_normalized: tds ra advance tax ko calculation method ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Can be adjusted against final tax
comparison_table.option_b: Can be adjusted against final tax

comparison_table.option_a: TDS rates as per Income Tax Act
comparison_table.option_b: Advance tax based on projected income

explanation_ne: TDS fixed rate, advance tax estimated. Duitai final tax ma adjust huncha.

question_ne: TDS ra Advance Tax ko due date ma k farak?
question_normalized: tds ra advance tax ko due date ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Within 15 days of end of month (for monthly) or at payment
comparison_table.option_b: By first installment: Poush, second: Chaitra? (Nepal: 3 installments)
Advance tax no separate return, adjusted at year-end
Advance installments typically by Poush, Chaitra, Ashad?

explanation_ne: TDS time ma bujhna parcha, advance tax ni time ma tirnu parcha.

question_ne: TDS ra Advance Tax ko benefit kasailai?
question_normalized: tds ra advance tax ko benefit kasailai

comparison_table.option_a: Government gets tax early, deductee gets credit
comparison_table.option_b: Government gets tax early, taxpayer avoids interest

comparison_table.option_a: Deductor holds tax but must deposit

comparison_table.option_b: Common for businesses with high income

explanation_ne: Duitai le government lai early tax dincha. TDS le deductee lai credit, advance le taxpayer lai interest bachcha.
when_to_use_b: As a taxpayer (if income exceeds threshold)

question_ne: TDS ra Advance Tax ko penalty ma k farak?
question_normalized: tds ra advance tax ko penalty ma k farak

comparison_table.option_b: Interest if advance tax < 90% of actual

explanation_ne: Duitai penalty similar, tara TDS ko non-deduction jhyau.

question_ne: TDS ra Advance Tax ko credit system ma k farak?
question_normalized: tds ra advance tax ko credit system ma k farak
explanation_ne: TDS credit lina certificate chaincha, advance tax ko payment receipt.
when_to_use_a: When receiving income subject to TDS

question_ne: PAN ra VAT number ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: pan ra vat number ma k farak cha

comparison_table.option_a: Permanent Account Number for income tax
For income tax returns, TDS, PAN card

explanation_ne: PAN income tax ko lagi, VAT number VAT ko lagi. Duitai IRD le dincha.
when_to_use_b: When issuing VAT invoices, claiming input VAT

question_ne: PAN ra VAT number ko registration process ma k farak?
question_normalized: pan ra vat number ko registration process ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: PAN must be quoted in all transactions
comparison_table.option_b: VAT number must be printed on invoices

explanation_ne: PAN sabai lai, VAT turnover vayeko lai matra.

question_ne: PAN ra VAT number ko cancellation ma k farak?
question_normalized: pan ra vat number ko cancellation ma k farak

comparison_table.option_b: Can cancel if turnover falls below threshold

explanation_ne: PAN permanent, VAT number can be cancelled if turnover low.

question_ne: PAN ra VAT number ko verification ma k farak?
question_normalized: pan ra vat number ko verification ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Can verify with name and PAN

explanation_ne: Duitai online verify garna milcha.

question_ne: PAN ra VAT number ko Nepal ma compulsory?
question_normalized: pan ra vat number ko nepal ma compulsory

comparison_table.option_b: Only if annual turnover > Rs. 5 million (or 2M)

explanation_ne: PAN compulsory, VAT threshold-based.
when_to_use_b: Get VAT only if threshold crossed

question_ne: PAN ra VAT number ko use in bank transactions?
question_normalized: pan ra vat number ko use in bank transactions

comparison_table.option_b: VAT not required for normal account

comparison_table.option_a: PAN must be quoted for > Rs. 1 lakh

comparison_table.option_b: VAT number may be required for business loan

explanation_ne: Bank ma PAN compulsory, VAT optional.

question_ne: Fixed assets ra Current assets ma k farak cha?
question_normalized: fixed assets ra current assets ma k farak cha
explanation_ne: Fixed assets long-term, current assets short-term. Fixed depreciates, current does not.

question_ne: Fixed assets ra Current assets ko balance sheet ma k position?
question_normalized: fixed assets ra current assets ko balance sheet ma k position

comparison_table.option_b: At lower of cost or net realizable value (inventory)
NAS 2 for inventory, NAS 7 for cash

explanation_ne: Balance sheet ma current paila, fixed pachhi.

question_ne: Fixed assets ra Current assets ko impact on profitability?
question_normalized: fixed assets ra current assets ko impact on profitability

comparison_table.option_b: Cost of goods sold reduces profit (inventory)

comparison_table.option_a: High fixed assets → high operating leverage
comparison_table.option_b: High current assets → low liquidity risk

explanation_ne: Fixed asset dherai huda depreciation le profit ghatcha, current asset dherai huda liquidity ramro.

question_ne: Fixed assets ra Current assets ko tax treatment ma k farak?
question_normalized: fixed assets ra current assets ko tax treatment ma k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Gain on sale taxable as capital gain
Input VAT on purchase can be claimed (if used in business)
comparison_table.option_b: Input VAT on inventory can be claimed

comparison_table.option_a: Can be written off if impaired

explanation_ne: Fixed ma depreciation, current ma cost of goods sold.

question_ne: Fixed assets ra Current assets ko management approach k farak?
question_normalized: fixed assets ra current assets ko management approach k farak

comparison_table.option_a: Focus on fixed assets for production
comparison_table.option_b: Focus on current assets for cash flow

explanation_ne: Fixed asset management long-term, current asset management daily.

question_ne: Fixed assets ra Current assets ko example Nepal ma?
question_normalized: fixed assets ra current assets ko example nepal ma

comparison_table.option_b: Cash at bank, stock of goods, accounts receivable

explanation_ne: Fixed assets like building, current like stock.
